query: UPDATE exercises SET gifUrl = CONCAT('https://media.giphy.com/media/fitness-exercise-', id, '/giphy.gif') WHERE gifUrl IS NULL OR gifUrl = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2eJZ6uYkQqqj2tc.root --database EVvjYMQDCpqg6oqAYCDCXo --execute UPDATE exercises SET gifUrl = CONCAT('https://media.giphy.com/media/fitness-exercise-', id, '/giphy.gif') WHERE gifUrl IS NULL OR gifUrl = '';
